message:
bd-1lg.27: List widget selection & filter interaction tests

Add 25 new unit tests covering gaps in List widget:
- Filter + navigation: navigate up/down while filter active, vi j/k with filter
- Filter behavior: case insensitive, marker matching, preserves/moves selection
- Multi-select: toggle while filtered, disable clears extras, untoggle,
  deselect clears set, select_next preserves others
- Edge cases: Ctrl+modifier ignored, Space with no selection noop,
  Backspace/Escape on empty filter, navigation in empty filtered result
- API: set_filter_query/clear_filter_query reset offset, noop clear

Total list tests: 89 (was 64).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
